name: Apple IIgs (ROM 4 Mark Twain)
comment: ROM 4 'Mark Twain' is the unreleased ~1992 Apple IIgs prototype firmware (GS/OS-in-ROM, 256KB / banks $FC-$FF). These Apple ROM images are NOT redistributed in this fork — fetch them yourself from the Asimov / Apple II Documentation Project mirror, then drop them in this folder (main.rom + char.rom). The .bin is most likely the 'prototype12' Mark Twain dump; the ~1994 ROM 4 source in the GS/OS sources is a different, later revision worked on in a limited fashion after the Mark Twain board was rejected by Apple. Selected in gssquared as the 'Apple IIgs (ROM 4 Mark Twain)' system (rom_dir override = apple2gs4, platform stays PLATFORM_APPLE_IIGS).

roms.md5_note: 256KB IIgs ROM 4 image — verify your dump matches the 262144-byte Asimov mirror file

roms.comment: IIgs Mega II video/character ROM — identical across IIgs ROM revisions. Same file as roms/apple2gs/char.rom (already in this repo); copy it here, or extract from the Asimov 'Apple IIGS ROM Images' set.
